_publications._publicationTitle: An inflammatory gene signature distinguishes neurofibroma Schwann cells and macrophages from cells in the normal peripheral nervous system.

_contextSnippet: This conditioned medium significantly increased migration of bone marrow derived macrophages (p < 0.009), as compared to wild-type SC conditioned medium
details: Successfully used in macrophage migration assay where neurofibroma SC conditioned medium significantly increased migration of bone marrow derived macrophages (p < 0.009) compared to wild-type SC conditioned medium
